company: Shanghai United Imaging Intelligence Co., Ltd.
intended_use: uAI Easy Triage ICH is a radiological computer-assisted triage and notification software device indicated for analysis of non-enhanced head CT images. The device is intended to assist hospital network
intended_use_full: uAI Easy Triage ICH is a radiological computer-assisted triage and notification software device indicated for analysis of non-enhanced head CT images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained radiologists in workflow triage by flagging and prioritizing studies with suspected positive findings of Intracranial Hemorrhage (ICH).
other_metrics: Time to Notification: average 41.1 seconds (95% CI: 40.1-42.1)
